summary: Comprehensive testing of Nep - Conversational Dev Partner feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Nep chat interface, conversation history sidebar, URL attachment, proposal system, and site content changes applied via Nep.
critical_code_review_comments: Nep feature is well-implemented with proper session persistence in MongoDB
Chill dev personality comes through in responses (yo, fam, let's cook, etc.)
Proposal system correctly parses JSON blocks from AI responses
URL analysis feature properly fetches and includes web content in prompts
Conversation history sidebar correctly displays past sessions
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nep conversational dev partner feature fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) /api/nep/chat accepts messages and returns AI responses with chill personality, 2) /api/nep/sessions returns conversation list, 3) /api/nep/sessions/{id} returns full messages, 4) /api/nep/confirm applies or rejects proposals, 5) Sessions can be deleted, 6) Frontend shows conversation history sidebar, 7) URL attachment feature works, 8) Proposals show with confirm/reject buttons, 9) Site content changes via Nep are applied (hero_headline changed to 'THE VAULT AWAITS'). Nep uses Gemini via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
passed_tests: Frontend: Admin login with password A@070610
Frontend: Neplit tab accessible in admin panel
Frontend: Nep chat interface displays correctly
Frontend: Conversation history sidebar shows past sessions
Frontend: Chat input textarea accepts messages
Frontend: URL attachment button opens URL input
Frontend: URL chips display after adding URLs
Frontend: Suggestion buttons present for quick prompts
Frontend: Messages sent and Nep responds with chill personality
Frontend: Site content 'THE VAULT AWAITS' displayed on main page (changed via Nep)

nep_personality_verified.sample_response: Yo, what up, fam! Everything's good in the lab, just chilling, ready to cook.
